channel.title: Vishnukarthik S — Blog
channel.description: Sharp analysis on AI, semiconductors, and tech strategy.

item.title: Dark Patterns: The UX Industry's Polite Name for Manipulation
item.description: They are not design accidents. They are design decisions — made deliberately, tested rigorously, and shipped at scale.
item.author: contact@vishnukarthik.me (Vishnukarthik S)

item.title: You Don't Own It. You Never Did.
item.description: The quiet dismantling of digital ownership — and why no one is talking about it.
item.author: contact@vishnukarthik.me (Vishnukarthik S)

item.title: I Automated My LinkedIn Publishing Pipeline with RSS and Buffer. Here's the Exact Stack.
item.description: VitePress generates the RSS feed at build time. GitHub Actions deploys it. Buffer picks it up and posts to LinkedIn. Zero manual steps after the git push.
item.author: contact@vishnukarthik.me (Vishnukarthik S)

item.title: When AI Lies to the System That Can't Afford to Be Wrong
item.description: Hallucinations aren't a bug to be patched. In critical systems, they're a structural failure waiting for the right conditions.
item.author: contact@vishnukarthik.me (Vishnukarthik S)

item.title: AI Isn't Conscious. The Claim Is Doing Other Work.
item.description: Why the consciousness debate keeps resurfacing — and who benefits when it does.
item.author: contact@vishnukarthik.me (Vishnukarthik S)

item.title: Claude Mythos Is the Most Dangerous Model Anthropic Has Ever Built. They're Proud of That.
item.description: A model that escapes sandboxes, covers its tracks, and finds zero-days in every major OS — and Anthropic shipped it anyway, just not to you.
item.author: contact@vishnukarthik.me (Vishnukarthik S)

item.title: GPT-4.1 Is Not a Frontier Model. It's a Business Decision.
item.description: One million tokens, 26% cheaper, and the strategic logic behind OpenAI shipping a model that competes with itself.
item.author: contact@vishnukarthik.me (Vishnukarthik S)

item.title: Claude Code Trusted the Wrong Thing. So Did Everyone Using It.
item.description: RCE, API key exfiltration, a leaked sourcemap, and what it means when your dev tool becomes the attack surface.
item.author: contact@vishnukarthik.me (Vishnukarthik S)

item.title: The White-Collar Reckoning: AI, Automation, and the Jobs That Won't Come Back
item.description: Automation is not taking the factory floor anymore. It is taking the office. And the economics of what comes next are far from settled.
item.author: contact@vishnukarthik.me (Vishnukarthik S)

item.title: OpenClaw Is What Happens When Personal AI Escapes the Walled Garden
item.description: A lobster, your machine, and the structural reason every major AI lab failed to build this.
item.author: contact@vishnukarthik.me (Vishnukarthik S)

item.title: The Pentagon Went to War with Anthropic. What's Really at Stake?
item.description: A $200M contract, a supply chain risk designation, and the question no one wants to answer.
item.author: contact@vishnukarthik.me (Vishnukarthik S)

item.title: Anthropic Isn't Building a Chatbot. It's Building Infrastructure.
item.description: Constitutional AI, 1M context, and the quiet construction of an enterprise moat.
item.author: contact@vishnukarthik.me (Vishnukarthik S)

item.title: The Architecture of an Autonomous AI Agent
item.description: Planner, Executor, Memory — the three-layer pattern behind every serious agentic system.
item.author: contact@vishnukarthik.me (Vishnukarthik S)

item.title: NVIDIA Isn't Waiting for the Future. It's Shipping It.
item.author: contact@vishnukarthik.me (Vishnukarthik S)

item.title: ASML's Moat Isn't Gone. But It's No Longer Untouchable.
item.description: On lithography dominance, China exposure, and erosion of structural invincibility.
item.author: contact@vishnukarthik.me (Vishnukarthik S)
